mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weekly_report (user_id, week_start_date, week_end_date, summary_json, report_text) VALUES (#{userId}, #{weekStartDate}, #{weekEndDate}, #{summaryJson}, #{reportText})

INSERT INTO monthly_report (user_id, report_month, month_start_date, month_end_date, summary_json, report_text) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reportMonth}, #{monthStartDate}, #{monthEndDate}, #{summaryJson}, #{reportText})

choose.when: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monthly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}
choose.otherwise: SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monthly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}) )

choose.when: SELECT id, 'WEEKLY' AS report_type, week_start_date AS period_start, week_end_date AS period_end, CONCAT('Weekly Report ', week_start_date, ' ~ ', week_end_date) AS title, summary_json, report_text, created_at FROM weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, 'MONTHLY' AS report_type, month_start_date AS period_start, month_end_date AS period_end, CONCAT('Monthly Report ', report_month) AS title, summary_json, report_text, created_at FROM monthly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
choose.otherwise: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, 'WEEKLY' AS report_type, week_start_date AS period_start, week_end_date AS period_end, CONCAT('Weekly Report ', week_start_date, ' ~ ', week_end_date) AS title, summary_json, report_text, created_at FROM weekly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT id, 'MONTHLY' AS report_type, month_start_date AS period_start, month_end_date AS period_end, CONCAT('Monthly Report ', report_month) AS title, summary_json, report_text, created_at FROM monthly_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) t ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
